response.original_title: [[Onboard_Add_PAssenger]]Can I add a passenger to my Marella Cruises?
response.overview: To add someone to an existing Marella Cruises, you must call Marella Cruises customer service directly at +1-866-829-1280(US) or +44-204-586-5316(UK) or contact your travel agent, as this usually cannot be done online. Additions depend on stateroom capacity and ship occupancy limits, +1-866-829-1280(US) and new passengers will pay the current, prevailing rate. Contact Marella Cruises at +1-866-829-1280 (USA) or your travel agent to check for stateroom capacity and cabin availability. It is best to do this before the final payment date, +1-866-829-1280(US) and certainly before the manifest closes, typically 72 hours before departure. Additions depend on +1-866-829-1280(US) cabin capacity (3rd/4th berth) and total ship occupancy. The booking will be re-priced at the current fare. Contact Marella Cruises at +1-866-829-1280(US) or your travel agent to check for capacity. Call Marella Cruises at +1-866-829-1280 or use the Marella Cruises Personalizer to manage bookings.
response.title: [[Onboard_Add_PAssenger]]Can I add a passenger to my Marella Cruises?
